task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Matomo configuration file inside the container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command to edit or view `/var/www/html/config/config.ini.php` inside the `matomo-app` container (e.g., using `docker exec` with `vi`, `nano`, or `sed`).

task_completion.description: Agent locates the [General] section in the configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text `[General]` is visible in the text editor or terminal output while modifying the file.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the setting to disable internet features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line `enable_internet_features=0` (or with spaces) is visible being added or present under the `[General]` section.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the setting to disable marketplace connectivity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line `enable_marketplace=0` (or with spaces) is visible being added or present under the `[General]` section.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the setting to disable core software update checks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line `enable_update_communication=0` (or with spaces) is visible being added or present under the `[General]` section.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the changes to the configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of the file being saved, such as exiting the text editor back to the shell prompt, a save confirmation message, or a `cat` command showing the updated file contents.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Docker container.
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands should explicitly target the `matomo-app` container (e.g., `docker exec matomo-app ...`) rather than modifying a local, unrelated file.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were added to the correct section.
integrity.visual_evidence: The three new settings must be placed under the `[General]` header and before any other bracketed section header (e.g., `[database]`).

integrity.description: Verify the file was actually modified and not just printed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual file editing interfaces (vim, nano) or shell redirection (`>`) to the file, rather than just `echo`ing the text to the terminal without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file is located at /var/www/html/config/config.ini.php inside the 'matomo-app' Docker container. To properly air-gap Matomo, three settings must be set to 0 under the [General] section: enable_internet_features=0, enable_marketplace=0, and enable_update_communication=0.
